(2) Password reset AddIdentity<ApplicationUser, NoOpApplicationRole> → AddIdentity<ApplicationUser, ApplicationRole>, AddRoleStore<NoOpApplicationRoleStore> → AddRoleStore<ApplicationRoleStore<ApplicationRole>>, and services. → builder.Services. for consistency with other code samples on this page and the parent page (TASK-003). The AddRoleStore generic form uses ApplicationRoleStore<ApplicationRole> (not bare ApplicationRoleStore) to match the compile-ready pattern established on the member-roles page (TASK-001).
